workflows.name: Background Service Initialization
steps: enableSidePanelActionClick() - configures chrome.sidePanel (Chromium only)
registerWhatsNewInstallListener() - marks badge on update
registerDeepSeekHeaderScrubListeners() - cleans stale auth headers
registerAutomationAlarmListener() - listens for automation wakeup
refreshBackgroundLocale() -> createContextMenus() - builds context menus
watchLocalePreference() - watches locale changes
archiveStaleMemories() - archives 90+ day untouched memories
ensureBuiltInMcpPresets() - creates Shell MCP preset if missing
ensureAutomationWakeAlarm() - creates alarm every 1 minute
reconcileInterruptedChatLoopOnWake() - detects SW-killed loops
scrubStoredClientHeaders() - removes expired auth headers
scanDueAutomationsFromWake() - runs due automations
workflows.auth_assumptions: Extension context alive; chrome.* APIs available
workflows.error_handling: reportBackgroundStartupError() logs errors; all startup tasks fire-and-forget with .catch()
workflows.race_conditions: Startup tasks run concurrently without coordination; locale may change mid-init; memory archive and MCP preset ensure are idempotent

workflows.name: Central Message Router
workflows.trigger: chrome.runtime.onMessage from content scripts, sidepanel, or other extension pages
steps: Background listener receives message + sender
handleMessage() giant switch(message.type) dispatches (~80 message types)
Each handler reads/writes specific data stores
Many write handlers call broadcastStateUpdate() to notify content scripts
Response sent via sendResponse() with structured payloads
data_read_write: Virtually every data store: memories, skills, presets, MCP servers, tool descriptors, browser control settings, usage records, sync config, automations
workflows.auth_assumptions: Message sender has extension runtime; content scripts on chat.deepseek.com
workflows.error_handling: createBackgroundErrorResponse() wraps errors; EXECUTE_TOOL_CALL errors return ToolResult with ok:false
workflows.race_conditions: Multiple concurrent messages processed via separate Promise chains; sidepanelChatSubmitPromise mutex; conversationExportControllers map; sidepanelRunningToolEvents map

workflows.name: Fetch Interception & Prompt Augmentation
steps: main-world.content.ts installFetchHook() replaces window.fetch
Hooked fetch detects chat stream URL
Captures DeepSeek client headers via onHeadersCaptured
Sends AUGMENT_REQUEST_BODY message to content script
Content script resolves project context, calls augmentRequestBody()
augmentRequestBody() builds prompt augmentation: memories, tools, skills, presets
Modified body sent back to main world
Hooked fetch calls original fetch with modified body
Response intercepted: SSE chunks parsed, tool calls extracted
XmlToolStreamFilter strips XML tool blocks from visible text
RESPONSE_COMPLETE and RESPONSE_TOKEN_SPEED events broadcast
data_read_write: Read: memories, skills, presets, tool descriptors, project context
Write: memory accessCount, request message count
workflows.auth_assumptions: User logged into chat.deepseek.com; valid Authorization token
workflows.error_handling: Extension invalidation guards; bridge message validation; graceful fallback to null augmentation
workflows.race_conditions: INITIAL_HOOK_STATE_WAIT_MS 1.5s timeout; bridge polling 50ms x 100; pending augmentation UUID tracking with 8s timeout

workflows.name: Main World <-> Content Script Bridge
workflows.trigger: content script + main world script both load on chat.deepseek.com
steps: main-world polls DPP_BRIDGE_REQUEST every 50ms
Isolated-world content script listens, creates MessageChannel
Content script sends port2 to main world via DPP_BRIDGE_INIT
Main world receives port, stores as contentPort, sends BRIDGE_READY
Content script flushes pending message queue
Bidirectional communication established
data_read_write: In-memory message queues; no persistent storage
workflows.error_handling: Message validation via validateBridgeMessage(); bridge disconnects trigger extensionInvalidationGuards
workflows.race_conditions: Polling 50ms x 100 = 5s max; both start at document_start but may execute in different microtask order; port establishment one-time guarded

workflows.name: Tool Execution Pipeline
workflows.trigger: EXECUTE_TOOL_CALL message from sidepanel or inline tool execution
steps: handleMessage receives EXECUTE_TOOL_CALL with ToolCall payload
executeBackgroundRuntimeToolCall() dispatches by tool name
browser_capture_screenshot -> executeBrowserScreenshotVisionTool()
Browser control tools -> executeBrowserControlToolCall() with act-verify
All other tools -> executeRuntimeToolCall() routes to providers
Result appended to tool call history
For browser actions: maybeAttachActVerifyCapture() captures evidence
data_read_write: Read: MCP configs, browser control settings, web tool settings
workflows.auth_assumptions: DeepSeek auth for Vision upload; Chrome debugger for browser control; host permissions for web search
workflows.error_handling: ToolResult with ok:false and structured error; throwIfRuntimeToolAborted(); normalizeVisionCaptureToolError()
workflows.race_conditions: AbortSignal checked at multiple points; sidepanelRunningToolEvents Map; SIDEPANEL_TOOL_CALLS_PER_STEP_LIMIT

workflows.name: Sidepanel Chat Flow
workflows.trigger: User types message in sidepanel ChatPage
steps: ChatPage receives user input
Message sent to background via sidepanelChatSubmit
Background resolves auth headers from stored DeepSeek session
Content script creates DeepSeek chat session if needed
Message forwarded to DeepSeek API via hooked fetch
Response streamed back through bridge
Tool calls detected and executed in background
Results rendered in sidepanel ChatMessage component
workflows.auth_assumptions: DeepSeek auth headers from browser session
external_service_calls: DeepSeek API via content script bridge
workflows.error_handling: sidepanelChatSubmitPromise mutex prevents parallel submissions; error rendering in ChatMessage component
workflows.race_conditions: Chat loop interruption on page navigation; auth header expiry during long conversations

workflows.name: Automation Execution
steps: scanDueAutomationsFromWake() finds due automations
Automation runner prepares request with auth and prompt context
Readiness preflight checks auth, session, and tool availability
Runner creates/resumes DeepSeek session via content script
Message submitted and response streamed
Tool calls executed in background
Flight recorder captures execution trace
Run status updated in automation store
Chain policy triggers next automation if configured
workflows.auth_assumptions: DeepSeek auth headers captured from browser session; PoW challenge solving
workflows.error_handling: Flight recorder captures failure phase; retry scheduling; chain depth limits
workflows.race_conditions: Concurrent automation runs; auth header expiry; tab lifecycle during automation

workflows.name: Browser Control Tool Execution
workflows.trigger: AI outputs browser_* tool call in response
steps: Tool call parsed from XML in AI response
Dispatched to executeBrowserControlToolCall()
Target tab resolved from controlled tab registry
CDP connection attached to target tab
Action executed (navigate, click, fill, snapshot, etc.)
Optional act-verify capture for evidence
Result returned with snapshot or action output
CDP connection detached or kept based on settings
workflows.auth_assumptions: Chromium browser with debugger permission; user enabled browser control
workflows.error_handling: Structured errors for CDP failures; stale UID errors; tab detach detection
workflows.race_conditions: CDP connection race conditions; tab navigation during action; concurrent browser actions
